chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 4753 of 2016 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on Misc. No.23638/2016 2. For hearing of Misc. No.7393/2021 3. For hearing of Misc. No.23639/2016 4. For hearing of main case 20.05.2025 Mr. Imran Taj, advocate for the petitioner Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General Per learned counsel, notice/s has been impugned herein, however, the same shall be contested before the issuing authority. Learned counsel seeks that the same be adjudicated vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending the aforesaid no coercive action be taken there against. Learned A.A.G. articulates no cavil in such regard and states that the petition be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
